main.title: Core shell is ready
main.description: Mobile-first starter with router, redux, i18n, toast, api, and Telegram base helpers.
main.controlsDescription: Base actions to verify integrations quickly.
main.baseModalDescription: Reusable centered modal for common dialogs.
main.baseModalBody: Use this as a default modal layer. Business-specific modals should extend it.
main.sheetModalDescription: Bottom sheet style modal for mobile-first interactions.
main.sheetModalBody: Swipe down or tap close to dismiss this modal.
main.uiDemoDescription: Simple primitive usage for quick starter validation.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.description: This route does not exist in the starter.

error.title: Unexpected error
error.description: Use this route as the base fallback page.
